trash.title: Soft delete / Trash
trash.description: Move deleted objects to .datasafe-trash instead of permanent delete.

ldap.title: LDAP / Active Directory
ldap.dockerHint: When DataSafeS3 runs in Docker, localhost is auto-rewritten to reach the host LDAP server.
ldap.groupsHint: LDAP group names are matched to tenant group IdP map on login.
ldap.syncIntervalHint: 0 disables background sync. Default 60 when LDAP is enabled.

oidc.title: OIDC / SSO
oidc.dockerHint: When DataSafeS3 runs in Docker, set internal issuer to reach the IdP from the container.
oidc.groupsHint: OIDC group names from this JWT claim are matched to tenant group IdP map.

mfa.title: MFA policy
mfa.hint: Personal MFA enrollment is in Profile.

logging.title: External logging
logging.description: Forward structured JSON logs to multiple sinks simultaneously.

swagger.title: Community API (Swagger)
swagger.description: Interactive OpenAPI explorer for the Community Integration API.
